what_it_does: Renders a static design-system preview card for display typography, showing a large Sora 700 specimen line with a gold-accented word and a metadata row describing font, weight, tracking, and intended use.
observations: The file is a complete standalone HTML document.
A dsCard metadata comment labels the preview as Brand / Display — Sora 700 with subtitle Hero specimen with gold accent and viewport 700x240.
It imports _card.css and defines file-local CSS for the card, specimen text, accent span, and metadata row.
The specimen text reads "The mathematics of operation." with only "operation" colored via var(--accent-gold).
The metadata row lists Sora, Display · 700, Tracking −2.5%, and Used for: hero, screen titles.
standouts: Large display specimen uses var(--font-display) at 700 weight and 76px size.
Gold accent is applied through a scoped span class inside the specimen.
Typography guidance is embedded directly in the rendered preview through the metadata row.
conventions: Uses CSS custom properties for font and color tokens.
Keeps preview-specific styling inline in the document head.
Uses semantic-light static HTML with a paragraph for the specimen and spans for metadata.
Relies on a dsCard HTML comment for preview catalog metadata.
concerns: The accent class name .a is terse and only meaningful by reading the CSS.
The layout uses fixed large type and a declared 700x240 viewport, which may not adapt gracefully outside the intended preview size.
notes: This file is a compact display-type specimen card that documents Sora 700 hero/title usage with a gold accent treatment.
questions: Is the dsCard comment consumed by a preview catalog generator?
Are the listed usage notes intended as documentation content or only visual specimen metadata?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated dsCard purpose matches the rendered content: it is a Brand display typography card for Sora 700 with a gold accent.
intention_signals: It seems intended to make the display type style visually inspectable while pairing the specimen with its font, weight, tracking, and usage guidance.
novelty: A static HTML preview card combines a hero-scale type specimen, tokenized styling, catalog metadata, and visible typographic usage notes in one small file.
contribution: Contributes a display typography specimen pattern with tokenized Sora styling, a word-level gold accent, and a compact metadata row describing how the style is used.
summary_for_embedding: Standalone HTML design-system preview card rendering a Sora 700 display typography specimen with a gold accent word and metadata for tracking and usage.
intention_for_embedding: This was for documenting and previewing a brand display type treatment intended for heroes and screen titles.
